metadata.description: Brain-native skills for Claude Code. OSINT, creative thinking, testing, DevOps, and more.

plugins.name: brain
plugins.description: Brain package manager — install, update, list skills from registries

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: Zero-filter brainstorming on projects, ideas, and decisions

plugins.name: devil
plugins.description: Devil's advocate — ruthlessly challenges any idea, plan, or decision

plugins.name: scar
plugins.description: S.C.A.R. — Signal, Cause, Action, Reinforcement. Structured incident documentation.

plugins.description: Blog management — draft, publish, images for Jekyll and WordPress

plugins.name: inbox
